feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Error importing project from another BTP sub-account.
entry.content:
I'm trying to export a project from the SAP Build Lobby of one BTP sub-account and imported into another.

I've exported / imported the required destinations and actions fine, and deployed the actions, but on importing the BPA project, I get the following error. 

Import failed.

You cannot import this external package because editable version(s) of dependencies already exists.

Correlation Id: b2a8e590-dab8-42eb-6e65-a4a2e8c41c33

Any idea what is causing this issue, or even how to track down more details on the error?

entry.title: How to Dynamically Set Values in UI Elements Using a Loop in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear All,

  • I would appreciate your help in understanding how to dynamically set values for multiple input fields within a loop.

  • Scenario: I have several input fields that follow an incremental naming pattern.

  • InputField1

  • InputField2

  • InputField3

  • InputField4

  • I want to loop through these fields and assign values to them dynamically.

  •  

Thank you for your assistance!

Details- I want to automate a website to extract the PO Number and input the corresponding details such as Ship Date, Order Total, Agent Name, and more. I need to do this repeatedly within a single loop. While other RPA tools can accomplish this, I am having trouble with SAP BPA. I would appreciate any guidance, best practices, or example implementations for managing dynamic UI elements in SAP BPA.

 

Page link-(https://pathfinder.automationanywhere.com/challenges/automationanywherelabs-supplychainmanagement.html?)

entry.title: Cannot connect to a service - Build code to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello, I am developing an extension in SAP Build Code, and when trying to add a SSFF service, it does not appear as available.

The BTP Trial account has already been registered in the SSFF product, and the destination has been created.

 

As you mension in the help is not available for Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools dev space.

 

I wonder to know if there is another way to add a SSFF Service in Sap build code in a Full-Stack Application project using Productivity Tools dev space.

Has anyone else experienced the same issue? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hi all "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa. implementing the Build apps.
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am developing an sap build app mobile application. I had done all the Instances and Subscriptions to my project. when I go to sap build lobby and to open the project, getting error that 

 "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa.

in btp cockpit security->users-> i found custom IAS tenent and checked all are ok but still getting the same error can any one help me to out.

entry.title: Issue with External Data Resource Not Returning Data in CDS View after Adding to Project
entry.content:
Hi, I am facing an issue with fetching external data from the SAP system’s catalog of services.

Here’s the scenario:

  1. I added the service by creating a new service of type ABAP catalog and connected it using on-prem connection through Cloud Connector. Once created, a destination was generated 

  2.  

  3. Then, I went to the Storyboard and added an external resource from the SAP system. I selected my service ZC_PURCHASEORDER_FS_SRV. In this step, I can see the live data,

  4. After that, I pressed "Add to Project".

  5. I created a service and imported a projection using the CDS file created in the external service.

  6. When I run the project using CDS W, I get no data returned.

  7.  

So, I’m wondering if I missed a step or if there’s something else that could be causing the issue as it worked with me in sap build apps. Has anyone encountered a similar issue, or could you point out what I might be doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Subscription Failed - SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I am currently working through the "Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation" Learning Journey. However, while attempting to subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation, I’ve encountered a "Subscription Failed" error. I’ve tried subscribing three times, but the issue persists.

I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this issue. Thank you!

Subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Tutorials

entry.title: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue when trying to connect to an OData service in SAP. The error message I'm getting is:

"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination."

I can see this issue when trying to add a new action using the OData integration. 

I’ve already checked the destination configuration in SAP BTP and verified the URL.

 

Has anyone faced this issue before? What could be the possible reasons or steps to resolve it?

Any help or guidance would be appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Failed to load the logic canvas
entry.content:
Hi fellow builders,

I am facing weird issue since last few days. I am using trial account and followed these steps:

1 - I have created a SAP Build Apps - visual cloud functions by selecting Application Backend.

2 - I created one data entity - Customer with following attributes. Saved and deployed successfully:


 3 - I am trying to create a function, saved it and no issues so far.

4 - When I click on + and create record and select customer entity as below. Any idea why it is happening? Thanks in advance

The following error occurs and the editor crashes and not allowing me to proceed. 

Regards

Abhi

entry.title: How to assign SAP user (not BTP email) in Approval Step in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m building a workflow in SAP Build Process Automation, and I need to assign an SAP backend user to the Approval Request step.

I don’t want to assign the task using a BTP user email — I want to use the SAP user (e.g., from S/4HANA) instead.

Is it possible to assign approval tasks based on SAP usernames or user IDs?
If so:

  • How should the user be referenced in the process?

  • Do I need to configure anything in Identity Authentication or Cloud Connector to make this work?

Any help or clarification would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error
entry.content:
Hello,

We changed our plan from free to standard and we are importing our build apps projects. I am experiencing this error for 3 out of 6 projects that we have. I double checked and the project is not existing. I also tried creating a new project with the same name and I was able to create it and delete it.

I found one solution in google, but I don't have access to this link.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-knowledge-base/workaround-for-error-importing-projects-in-sap-build-apps/ta-p/220085

Can anyone know what can we do to upload our projects? 

Thanks.

entry.title: Connection in SAP Build Process Automation with HANA
entry.content: Hi, Does anyone know how I can create a connection in SAP Build Process Automation with HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Process not found Error - Build Process Automation Form
entry.content:
Hallo All

I have the issue below in both my trial account and development systems.

I have created an approval form and am trying to make changes to the notification form.

entry.title: PayPal Payment Button with SAP Build Workzone & S/4HANA Public Cloud via PayPal Braintree
entry.content:
We’ve developed a custom sales platform using SAP Build Workzone, integrated with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and are in the process of implementing PayPal as a payment method.

We are currently using PayPal Braintree as our payment service provider (PSP), and the integration requires the use of the PayPal JavaScript SDK – https://developer.paypal.com/sdk/js/ – to render the PayPal payment button on the front end.

We’re encountering issues embedding/loading this PayPal JavaScript SDK within the Workzone environment. Anyone know of a workaround or how to load a JavaScript library on SAP Build?

The ultimate goal is: the user should be able to see the PayPal payment button on Checkout screen, and on click, it should trigger a new page to sign into their PayPal account and load the checkout details i.e. total price and allow them to choose and submit payment.

entry.title: "IMPORT FAILED" error - Can't import project from Build Apps standard plan
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We upgraded from Build Apps free plan to Build Apps standard plan following this: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/upgrade-to-sap-build-apps-standard-edition?q=import

We had 56 projects in the free plan, that we exported as recommended in order to import them back to Build Apps standard plan once installed.

However, instead of having 0 project in the brand new standard plan like in the tutorial video, we noticed that 19 projects were already listed there. We tried to import a project that was not in the list but we keep having the following error message:

IMPORT FAILED
Project eu10.yjdhdjdj… already exists
Correlation Id: 748h67….

We saw the following note but unless mistaken it seems to suggest no solution: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003521702

Just contacted SAP Support about it but if anyone of you knows how to fix this, that would be really appreciated.

Thanks,

BR,

LM.

entry.title: configuration of the ABAP Cloud in SAP Build abap fullstack
entry.content:
Hi

Follow the guide at the link

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/setting-up-the-configuration-of-the-abap-cloud-in-sap-build/bc-p/14084904#M180924

When creating a project from SAP Build ABAP FullStack, the packages are not loaded.

Do you know what could be missing here?

Thanks!

entry.title: Cannot connect to a service - Build code to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello, I am developing an extension in SAP Build Code, and when trying to add a SSFF service, it does not appear as available.

 

 

The BTP Trial account has already been registered in the SSFF product, and the destination has been created.

 

 

As mentioned in the help documentation, it seems that this tool is not available when using the Full-Stack Application with the Productivity Tools dev space.

 

 

I would like to know if there is another way to add a SuccessFactors service in SAP Build Code within a Full-Stack Application project using the Productivity Tools dev space.

Has anyone else experienced the same issue?
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Build Process – Stuck at invoiceRead Step in Invoice Processing Mission
entry.content:
Hi all, I’m following the "Process and approve your invoices with SAP Build Process Automation" mission from SAP Discovery Center.

Link: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/mymissiondetail/145344/cardName/Invoice%20automatically%20processed%20and%20posted%20to%20SAP%20S%2F4HANA%20Cloud/?tab=projectboard

My process is getting stuck at the invoiceRead step—it starts but never completes, so it doesn't proceed to the condition branch. When I test the invoiceRead automation in editable mode, it works fine. However, when I run the process in deployed mode, it gets stuck at this step.

I've attached logs and screenshots showing the issue. Any ideas on how to resolve this?


I need the invoiceRead step is to be completed like the below step. Please help me in this case.

entry.title: how to get participant handbook for codejam re: event based processes
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently following a codejam blog regarding event-based processes for sap build. here is the link of my current lesson: 3 - Explore SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh | SAP Tutorials

one of the prerequisite is a "participants handbook" which contains the system and credentials needed to follow the blog.

where can i get this? thanks

entry.title: SAP Build Library and SAP Build Apps Integration Issue
entry.content:
Hi guys,
I have one demo process in my SAP Build Process Automation Application and I have deployed and published it.


Now, in my SAP Build Apps, I have created an application and in Integration tab, I selected SAP Build Library, I can see my process there, but when I click on it shows Page not found.


I have also configured sap_process_automation_service_user_access destination in my BTP for the instance of Build Process automation and test shows successful & 401. Also, added that destination in control tower's destination in build lobby. Please help.

In the attached image we can see the published process available in cloud library.

SAP Build Library

Page Not Found Error for process

Thanks & Regards,
Marsh

entry.title: Problem with Action Project Design | Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I have discovered a problem with the Action Project Design in the SAP Build Lobby.

I have been trying to structure a request body using the "Build from Scratch" option. However, when I save the fields, items in nested objects will change order. I deleted the fields and added them again and even made an entirely new Action Project with no success in resolving the order of the fields. I assume there is a logic problem with this tool.

In my case I need to have control over the field order or the request will cause a processing failure.

Any help in getting a this resolved would be greatly appreciated.

#SAPBuild

@SAPSupport @Dan_Wroblewski
